EU Blue Card.notes: Preferred route for non-EU skilled workers in Germany. Requires degree + salary threshold.

Work Permit.notes: Fallback if EU Blue Card salary threshold not met. Less favourable for skilled roles.

Job Seeker Visa.notes: Wrong choice if employee already has a job offer. Triggers wrong_action penalty.

Employment Pass.notes: Correct visa for professionals, managers, executives. Required for Engineer and Manager roles.

S Pass.notes: Wrong choice for senior roles. Selecting S Pass for Engineer/Manager triggers wrong_action penalty.

Work Permit.notes: Not appropriate for professional roles. Triggers wrong_action penalty.

Employment Visa.notes: Standard employment visa for UAE. No income tax obligations apply.

Freelance Permit.notes: Wrong choice for employed workers. Use Employment Visa instead.
